prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of DE (Deere & Company), the stock typically exhibits daily volatility around 1.8-2.2%. Over 20 days, this translates to approximately 8-10% total volatility. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum given DE's seasonal patterns and agricultural sector fundamentals. Confidence intervals are constructed using Monte Carlo simulation assuming log-normal price distribution with estimated drift and volatility parameters derived from historical data.
